title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF WESTERN TREASURE VALLEY HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities and team sports. Offers a prevention and education program that addresses issues such as drug and alcohol use and premature sexual activity. 573 SW 3rd Avenue Ontario, OR 97914 Eligibility: Ages 6-18 Hours: Monday-Friday 2:45pm-6:30pm on regular school days (follows the Ontario School District calendar), Summer: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5:30pm, Orientation: Wednesday 5:30pm Email (541) 889-7979 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 889-7979 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information. New members must attend an orientation meeting. FEES: Membership fee: $20 per child per school year. Additional fees apply for services. Financial assistance available. DOCUMENTS: Proof of income for financial assistance LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Zip codes 97913, 97914, and 97918 (Cities of Nyssa, Ontario, and Vale and surrounding areas) TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located across from the Red Apple parking lot on the Ontario Middle School campus Services: Alcohol Use Disorder Education/Prevention Drug Use Disorder Education/Prevention General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
